title: unit: Force and Translational Dynamics topic: Circular Motion learning objective: Describe circular orbits using Kepler’s third law. essential knowledge: For an object in circular orbit around a central body, the centripetal acceleration is provided solely by gravitational attraction. The period of the orbit is related to the radius and the mass of the central body (Kepler’s third law).
personas: Education Level: Junior high school | Learning Pace: Slow | Preferred Explanation Style: Derivation | Timeline Urgency: Normal | Depth Preference: Application-first
